scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web "npm -w apps/server run dev" "npm -w apps/frontend run dev"
scripts.typecheck:active: npm -w apps/server run typecheck && npm -w apps/frontend run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck && npm -w packages/shared run typecheck && npm -w packages/ui run typecheck && npm -w packages/web run typecheck && npm -w packages/desktop run typecheck && npm -w packages/mobile run typecheck
scripts.build:active: npm -w apps/server run build && npm -w apps/frontend run build
